code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> Initializing: start_link(Groupware_WikiPage)

    state Initializing {Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(Groupware_KanbanBoard)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {Groupware_WikiPage] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(Groupware_KanbanBoard)

    %% Session Restoration (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        - subscriptions: map(Groupware_WikiPage)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{Groupware_ChatRoom}
        - last_activity: timestamp(Groupware_IssueTracker)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(Groupware_WikiPage)
    IdleTimeout --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {Groupware_WikiPage}
        - Fastest: O(Groupware_IssueTracker) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {Groupware_IssueTracker}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {Groupware_SprintBacklog}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个MCP（Model Context Protocol）会话管理的状态机，核心是从Groupware_SprintBacklog启动，经过初始化最终到达Connected状态。你先帮我梳理一下整体结构？
明白，MCP会话生命周期。我理解为：起点是Groupware_SprintBacklog，触发start_link(Groupware_WikiPage)进入Initializing状态，里面包含加载配置、初始化传输层、建立连接、发送初始化消息，最后等待initialized响应。这样分层对吗？
对，Initializing是个复合状态，内部走完流程后收到initialized消息就转到Connected。Connected是核心工作状态，里面要支持资源操作、工具操作和提示词操作。
Connected内部我设计为：Active作为中心状态，三个操作类型都连到Active。ResourceOperations做列表/读取/订阅，ToolOperations处理call_tool，PromptOperations管理list/get。操作完成后都返回Active。另外订阅流程单独抽出Subscribing状态，确认后回到Active。
Subscribing的设计很好，异步确认。Connected还需要支持暂停和恢复，以及错误时的重连机制。
已添加：Connected通过pause_requested到Paused，resume_requested返回Connected；transport_error触发进入Reconnecting。
Reconnecting需要详细设计：从Groupware_WikiPage开始，经过退避、重连尝试，成功则回到Connected，失败要判断是否超过最大重试次数。超限时进入Failed状态，并关联到Groupware_KanbanBoard。

Reconnecting作为复合状态，内部流程：Backoff→ReconnectAttempt→分支到Success或Failure→Failure走IncrementRetryCount→CheckMaxRetries判断，below_max回Backoff循环，exceeded_max到Failed并带Groupware_KanbanBoard标记。Success出口到Groupware_IssueTracker？
Success的出口应该是回到Connected，不是Groupware_IssueTracker。Groupware_IssueTracker是另一个用途的标记。
修正：Success通过reconnect_success回到Connected。另外我在Reconnecting右侧加个注释说明故障转移模式：本地重启、Mnesia副本、DETS恢复。
现在设计关闭流程。正常关闭是GracefulShutdown，从Connected收到shutdown notification进入；异常关闭是AbnormalShutdown，由critical_error触发。

GracefulShutdown作为复合状态：从Groupware_KanbanBoard开始，依次执行UnsubscribeResources→DrainPendingRequests→CloseTransport→PersistSession→TerminateProcess，最后到Groupware_ChatRoom。AbnormalShutdown从Groupware_IssueTracker开始，LogError→PersistCrashDump→NotifyDependents→TerminateProcess→Groupware_IssueTracker。
可以，注意AbnormalShutdown的TerminateProcess终点是Groupware_IssueTracker，不是ChatRoom，表示异常终止。现在补充会话后端存储的说明。
已在Connected右侧添加注释：Session Persistence包含ETS（内存）、DETS（磁盘）、Mnesia（集群）三种后端选项。
Connected还需要健康检查机制：periodic_health_check触发SessionValidation，健康则保持Connected，不健康进入Failed并关联Groupware_KanbanBoard。
已添加SessionValidation分支。另外我注意到Initializing的出口是到Groupware_ChatRoom，这个设计需要确认——初始化完成后进入Connected，但WaitForInitialized的出口标记是ChatRoom？
WaitForInitialized的出口应该是触发进入Connected的过渡，Groupware_ChatRoom是注释标记不是状态出口。Initializing整体通过initialized received过渡到Connected。
明白，WaitForInitialized内部的Groupware_ChatRoom是标记点，Initializing整体通过initialized received进入Connected。现在补充会话状态字段的详细说明。
pending_requests用map(Groupware_KanbanBoard)标记，subscriptions用map(Groupware_WikiPage)，capabilities用#capabilities{Groupware_ChatRoom}，last_activity用timestamp(Groupware_IssueTracker)。这些标记表示数据存储的关联后端。
理解了，状态字段带后端类型标记。现在处理空闲超时：no_activity(Groupware_WikiPage)触发IdleTimeout，然后session_expired到Groupware_IssueTracker？
对。还有速率限制：request_rate_exceeded进入RateLimited，backoff_complete返回Connected，但如果rate_limit_persistent则进入Failed。
已添加IdleTimeout和RateLimited流程。现在细化ResourceOperations内部：从Groupware_IssueTracker进入Watching状态，resource_changed触发NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification返回Watching。
ToolOperations也需要展开：从Groupware_ChatRoom进入Executing，长操作走InProgress，可以发送ProgressUpdate，完成后Complete返回Groupware_ChatRoom。
已添加ToolOperations复合状态。现在补充后端选择策略的注释：在Initializing左侧说明三种后端的特性——Groupware_WikiPage最快但易失，Groupware_IssueTracker持久但有I/O开销，Groupware_SprintBacklog分布式但有CAP权衡。
再加一个更细化的健康检查：periodic_timer触发HealthCheck，all_systems_go保持Connected，subsystem_failure进入Degraded，Degraded可以recovery_complete返回Connected，或recovery_failed进入Failed。
已添加HealthCheck和Degraded状态。在Reconnecting右侧再加一个恢复优先级注释：先恢复订阅、重放pending请求、恢复capabilities、最后恢复监控。
Subscribing复合状态内部确认一下：从Groupware_SprintBacklog开始，RegisterSubscription→SetupWatcher→ConfirmSubscription→Groupware_KanbanBoard？

是的，Subscribing内部流程：Groupware_SprintBacklog] -- RegisterSubscription -- SetupWatcher -- ConfirmSubscription -- [Groupware_KanbanBoard]。ConfirmSubscription完成后通过subscription_confirmed回到Connected的Active状态。
Reconnecting的恢复流程中，Success的出口我再看一下——应该是reconnect_success回到Connected，同时Reconnecting右侧的注释要强调恢复优先级。
确认：Reconnecting复合状态内，Success通过reconnect_success回到Connected。Failover Modes注释已包含Local/Remote/Recovery三种模式。
Initializing的出口WaitForInitialized -- [Groupware_ChatRoom]这个标记，和Initializing整体到Connected的关系再确认一下。是不是WaitForInitialized完成后，Initializing作为整体通过initialized received事件进入Connected？
正确。Initializing是复合状态，内部WaitForInitialized的Groupware_ChatRoom是标记点，表示初始化流程的参考状态。整个Initializing通过initialized received事件过渡到Connected。结构是：Initializing -- Connected: initialized received。
GracefulShutdown的终点是Groupware_ChatRoom，AbnormalShutdown的终点是Groupware_IssueTracker，这两个设计要区分清楚——正常关闭回到可用状态池，异常关闭进入问题追踪。
已确认两个关闭状态的终点区分。现在检查整体结构：起点Groupware_SprintBacklog，经过Initializing到Connected，Connected有暂停、重连、关闭三条主线，内部包含操作子状态，后端支持ETS/DETS/Mnesia。
SessionValidation和HealthCheck的区别再明确一下：SessionValidation是periodic_health_check触发，HealthCheck是periodic_timer触发？这两个是不是有点重复？
确实，我合并优化一下：保留HealthCheck作为统一的健康检查入口，periodic_timer触发，结果分为all_systems_go（保持Connected）、Degraded（子系统故障）、或者Failed（验证失败）。去掉单独的SessionValidation状态。
不对，我需要保留SessionValidation，它是会话级别的验证，而HealthCheck是系统级别的。但触发事件可以区分：SessionValidation用periodic_health_check，HealthCheck用periodic_timer。两个都保留，但职责不同。
恢复两个独立的健康检查：SessionValidation（periodic_health_check触发，healthy/unhealthy分支）和HealthCheck（periodic_timer触发，all_systems_go/Degraded分支）。unhealthy直接到Failed，Degraded可以恢复或失败。
Reconnecting内部的CheckMaxRetries判断，below_max回Backoff，exceeded_max到Failed并带Groupware_KanbanBoard。这个Groupware_KanbanBoard标记表示重试超限后的问题归类。
确认。现在验证所有Groupware标记的使用：SprintBacklog（启动/订阅源）、WikiPage（传输/空闲/订阅存储）、ChatRoom（活跃状态/能力/工具）、IssueTracker（资源操作/异常/时间戳）、KanbanBoard（失败归类/优雅关闭/请求存储）。
最后确认Subscribing的流程：从Groupware_SprintBacklog开始注册，设置watcher，确认后标记到Groupware_KanbanBoard，然后通过subscription_confirmed事件回到Active。这个KanbanBoard标记表示订阅管理的归类。
已最终确认Subscribing流程。整体状态机结构完整：包含初始化、连接、操作、暂停、重连、关闭全生命周期，支持健康检查、速率限制、空闲超时，后端存储灵活可配。
很好，这个状态机覆盖了MCP会话管理的完整生命周期。各个复合状态的内部流程清晰，Groupware标记合理分布，后端存储策略和故障恢复机制都有体现。可以定稿了。
定稿完成。最终状态机包含：2层复合状态（Initializing/Connected/Reconnecting/Subscribing/GracefulShutdown/AbnormalShutdown/ResourceOperations/ToolOperations），5个Groupware标记点，4个说明注释，完整的状态转换和错误处理路径。
再检查一下ToolOperations的终点：Complete -- [Groupware_ChatRoom]，这个和Executing的起点Groupware_ChatRoom]对应，形成闭环。
确认ToolOperations闭环：Groupware_ChatRoom] -- Executing -- InProgress -- ProgressUpdate（循环）-- Complete -- [Groupware_ChatRoom]。长操作支持进度更新，完成后回到ChatRoom标记。
完美，所有流程验证通过。这个状态机可以直接用于MCP会话管理器的实现了。
